delivery_rules: internal HTML links to xlsx include download attribute
reverse proxy / CDN must not strip attachment header
nginx_reference_snippet: location /04-Bieu-Mau/ { types { application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet xlsx; application/vnd.ms-excel.sheet.macroEnabled.12 xlsm; application/vnd.ms-excel xls; } if ($request_uri ~* \\.(xlsx|xlsm|xls)$) { add_header Content-Disposition "attachment" always; add_header X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff" always; } }
iis_reference_snippet: Use outbound/response headers or staticContent + customHeaders so .xlsx/.xlsm/.xls return Content-Disposition: attachment and X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff.
